name: midnight-switchyard
description: Accessible spatial browser audio game built with Phaser and Aaja Audio Engine.

scripts.build: node scripts/verify-release-engine.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && vite build && node scripts/copy-release-wasm.mjs
scripts.build:mock: AAJA_ALLOW_MOCK=1 VITE_AAJA_MOCK=1 tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && AAJA_ALLOW_MOCK=1 VITE_AAJA_MOCK=1 vite build
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run audio:build && npm run audio:verify && npm run repo:verify && npm run build
